[BUG] Force bear direction for FDA CRL/rejection events in Perplexity parser
[BUG] Filter Perplexity new tickers through analyst blocklist

[BUG] Add yfinance retry with 30s backoff on complete batch failure
[BUG] Distinguish data failure from no alerts in price monitor logs
[BUG] Add max_stacking=2 per event type per ticker in heatmap
[BUG] Increase sec_shelf negative weight from -5 to -6 in heatmap

[BUG] Heatmap: increase sec_shelf negative weight from -5 to -6
[BUG] Price monitor: add yfinance retry with 30s backoff
[BUG] Price monitor: distinguish data failure from no-alert success

[CONFIG] Expand heatmap SIGNAL_WEIGHTS for 13 missing Perplexity types
